ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the patient */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the patient */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the patient */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the health condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health condition */,
  "condition_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the health condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of the health condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was diagnosed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_conditions" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was diagnosed with the condition */,
  "condition_status" TEXT /* Current status of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personality_traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personality trait */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the personality trait */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the personality trait */,
  "trait_definition" TEXT /* Definition of the personality trait */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the personality trait */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_personality" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personality trait */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score for the personality trait */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the personality assessment was taken */,
  "assessment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the personality assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "psychological_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each psychological test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the psychological test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the psychological test */,
  "test_definition" TEXT /* Definition of the psychological test */,
  "administration_method" TEXT /* Method used to administer the psychological test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_test_results" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the psychological test */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Result of the psychological test */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test result */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the researcher */,
  "area_of_expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher leading the study */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the research study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the study */,
  "funding_amount" TEXT /* Amount of funding for the study */,
  "irb_approval" TEXT /* IRB approval status for the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research study */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient participating in the study */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was enrolled in the study */,
  "participation_status" TEXT /* Status of the patient's participation in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Specific data accessed */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the researcher */,
  "role_assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "role_assignment_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id", "role_id")
)
